home.title: Launch a fast, multi-language website in minutes
home.subtitle: Ship a content-managed marketing site with built-in search engine optimization (SEO), four languages, and a headless content management system (CMS) — all from one repository.
home.logosTitle: Trusted by teams shipping on the web

features.title: One template, every page you need
features.description: Edit one config file to rebrand the whole site. The components, routing, and content layer are already wired up.

items.title: Config-driven branding
items.description: Set your name, colors, navigation, and social links in a single file. Every page updates at once.

items.title: Four languages out of the box
items.description: Locale-aware routing and translated content ship by default. Add or remove languages from one list.

items.title: Headless content management
items.description: Write posts and pages in an admin panel backed by a database, not by files in the codebase.

items.title: Search engine optimization built in
items.description: Canonical URLs, hreflang, sitemaps, and structured data are generated for you on every route.

items.title: Accessible components
items.description: Semantic landmarks, keyboard navigation, and clear focus styles come standard across the library.

items.title: Fast by default
items.description: Server-rendered pages, image optimization, and minimal client code keep load times low.

how.title: From clone to live in three steps
how.description: No boilerplate to assemble. Point the template at your brand and start writing.

steps.title: Configure
steps.description: Edit the site config with your brand name, colors, and navigation. The whole site reskins instantly.

steps.title: Add content
steps.description: Write posts and pages in the admin panel. Content is stored in a database and served on demand.

steps.title: Deploy
steps.description: Push to your host of choice. Sitemaps, metadata, and redirects are generated automatically.

items.question: Do I need to know how to code?
items.answer: Basic familiarity helps for the first setup, but day-to-day editing happens in the admin panel and the single config file.

items.question: Can I add my own languages?
items.answer: Yes. Add a locale to the config list and provide its translations. Routing and metadata follow automatically.

items.question: Where is the content stored?
items.answer: Content lives in a database through the built-in content management system, so it scales independently of your code.

items.question: Is it optimized for search engines?
items.answer: Every page emits canonical URLs, hreflang links, structured data, and a sitemap entry without extra work.

items.question: Can I change the colors and fonts?
items.answer: Yes. The theme config exposes brand colors, radius, and fonts. Edit the tokens and the whole site updates.

cta.title: Start building your site today
cta.description: Clone the template, set your brand, and publish your first page in an afternoon.

meta.title: Features
meta.description: A multi-language, SEO-ready website template with a headless content management system and an accessible component library.

hero.title: Everything you need to ship a marketing site
hero.description: A complete component library, a content layer, and search-engine optimization, all wired together so you can focus on content.

rows.title: Manage content without touching code
rows.description: Authors write in a familiar admin panel. The site reads content from a database, so publishing never requires a deploy.
bullets: Organize content with categories and authors

rows.title: Rank well from day one
rows.description: Search-engine optimization is built into the routing layer. Each page ships the metadata that search and answer engines expect.
bullets: Canonical URLs and hreflang per locale
Open Graph and social cards out of the box

rows.title: Accessible and fast on every device
rows.description: Components use semantic markup and keyboard-friendly interactions. Server rendering keeps pages quick on any connection.
bullets: Optimized images and minimal client code

grid.title: Batteries included
grid.description: The details that usually take weeks are already handled.

items.title: Locale switcher
items.description: Visitors change language while keeping their place on the page.

items.title: Redirect management
items.description: Map old URLs to new ones from the admin panel, no code changes required.

items.title: Blog and pages
items.description: Two content types ready to use, with cards, bylines, and prose styling.

items.title: Lead capture
items.description: A contact form ready to connect to your inbox or customer relationship tool.

items.title: Reusable sections
items.description: Hero, feature grids, pricing, and more compose into any page you need.

items.title: One config file
items.description: Rebrand colors, navigation, social links, and metadata from a single place.

items.question: Which content types are included?
items.answer: Blog posts and standalone pages, each with categories, authors, cover images, and per-language fields.

items.question: Can I compose my own pages?
items.answer: Yes. Every section is a standalone, data-driven component you can arrange into any layout.

items.question: How are images handled?
items.answer: Images run through the framework optimizer, so they are resized and served in modern formats automatically.

cta.title: See it running for your brand
cta.description: Set your config, add a page, and watch the whole site take your identity.

meta.title: Pricing
meta.description: Simple, transparent pricing. Start free, upgrade when you grow, and talk to us for enterprise needs.

hero.title: Pricing that scales with you
hero.description: Start free and only pay as your site and team grow. No hidden fees, no long-term lock-in.

tiers.title: Pick the plan that fits
tiers.description: Every plan includes the full component library and multi-language support.

items.name: Starter
items.description: Everything you need to launch a small site.

items.name: Enterprise
items.description: For larger teams with custom requirements.

items.question: Is there a free plan?
items.answer: Yes. The Starter plan is free and includes the full component library, one language, and search-engine optimization.

items.question: Can I change plans later?
items.answer: You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect immediately and billing is prorated.

items.question: Do you offer discounts?
items.answer: Annual billing comes with a discount, and we offer special pricing for nonprofits and educational teams.

items.question: What does enterprise include?
items.answer: Enterprise adds unlimited languages, single sign-on, custom integrations, and a service-level agreement with dedicated support.

cta.title: Try it free, no card required
cta.description: Launch on the free plan and upgrade only when you are ready.

meta.title: About
meta.description: We build open tools that help teams ship fast, accessible, multi-language websites.

hero.title: We help teams ship better websites, faster
hero.description: Our mission is to make a fast, accessible, multi-language web the default — not a months-long project.

values.title: Principles that guide the work
values.description: A few ideas shape every decision we make.

items.title: Accessible by default
items.description: A site is only finished when everyone can use it. Accessibility is a starting point, not an add-on.

items.title: Fast everywhere
items.description: Performance is a feature. We optimize for real devices and real networks, not just demos.

items.title: Open and portable
items.description: No lock-in. You own your content and your code, and you can take both anywhere.

items.title: Simple to maintain
items.description: Clear structure and one config surface keep the site easy to run long after launch.

cta.title: Build your next site with us
cta.description: Start free today, or reach out to talk about what you are building.

meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Get in touch. Tell us about your project and we will get back to you.

hero.title: Let us talk about your project
hero.description: Tell us what you are building and we will get back to you within one business day.

form.name: Name

info.title: Other ways to reach us
info.description: Prefer email or social? Find us wherever works best for you.

steps.title: We read your note
steps.description: A real person reviews your message and the context you shared.

steps.title: We reply
steps.description: Expect a thoughtful response within one business day, with next steps.

steps.title: We get going
steps.description: If it is a fit, we set up a quick call and start mapping out your site.

cta.title: Prefer to start on your own?
cta.description: Spin up the template on the free plan and reach out whenever you need a hand.

sections.heading: Overview
body: This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have. It applies to this website and the services offered through it.
By using the site, you agree to the practices described here. This is a template document and should be reviewed by a qualified professional before publication.

sections.heading: Information we collect
body: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name and email when you contact us. We also collect limited technical information, such as your browser type and the pages you visit, to keep the site reliable.
We do not sell your personal information.

sections.heading: How we use information
body: We use the information to respond to your requests, improve the site, and keep it secure. We retain personal information only as long as needed for these purposes or as required by law.

sections.heading: Your rights
body: Depending on where you live, you may have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. To exercise these rights, contact us using the details on our contact page.

sections.heading: Contact
body: If you have questions about this policy, please reach out through the contact page and we will respond promptly.

sections.heading: Acceptance of terms
body: These Terms of Service govern your use of this website. By accessing or using the site, you agree to be bound by these terms. This is a template document and should be reviewed by a qualified professional before publication.

sections.heading: Use of the site
body: You agree to use the site only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of others. We may suspend or end access if these terms are violated.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
body: The content and design of the site are protected by applicable laws. You may not copy, distribute, or create derivative works without permission, except where allowed by the site license.

sections.heading: Disclaimer
body: The site is provided on an as-is basis without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the site will be uninterrupted, error-free, or secure.

sections.heading: Changes
body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the site after changes take effect means you accept the revised terms.

footer.builtWith: Built with the Website Builder Optimizer template.

seo.homeDescription: A multi-language, SEO-ready Next.js website template with a headless content management system and an accessible component library.
